race.comment: ROYAL PRINCESS (10) started at $2.40 when resuming last time out in a 1500m Hawkesbury maiden but failed to live up to market expectations. Competitive at provincial level last prep so she deserves one more chance.  JOIKA (9) got going when the race was all over first-up at Tamworth. Can improve sharply with blinkers on for the first time. KING OF MANY (5) has finished midfield at both starts to date, the latest when sixth over 1400m at Tamworth on July 3. Great chance to feature. FINED FOR SPEEDING (3) finished midfield last start at Tamworth over 1400m, 3 lengths from the winner. Stretches out over further today and is in the mix.
